summary: Iteration 35 - Solar Corporate Premium UI/UX Testing Complete. All 10 requested features VERIFIED: 1) Homepage header light sky-blue solar panel grid effect ✓, 2) Homepage hero premium dark theme with gold gradient text ✓, 3) About Us page premium dark hero with MNRE badge ✓, 4) Gallery page premium gold-green gradient stats banner ✓, 5) Contact page premium dark hero and glassmorphism contact cards ✓, 6) Shop page premium dark blue header with green CTA buttons ✓, 7) Holi effect banner 'Happy Holi! 12 days to go!' visible ✓, 8) Holi floating color particles visible throughout page ✓, 9) Navigation menu gold hover underline effect ✓, 10) CTA buttons green glow effect on hover ✓. Current system date is March 2, 2026, which is within the Holi period (March 1-16, 2026), so Holi effects are correctly active.
critical_code_review_comments: App.js lines 851-946: Navigation header properly implements light sky-blue solar panel grid effect with linear-gradient #BAE6FD→#E0F2FE→#F0F9FF and 28px x 28px grid pattern overlay
App.js lines 971-1113: Hero section correctly uses radial-gradient from #0B3C5D to #071A2E with gold gradient text from-[#F5A623] to-[#FFD166]

HoliEffect.js: Correctly configured for Holi 2026 (March 1-16). Shows countdown banner, floating particles (25 particles), rainbow borders, color splashes, and keyframe animations (holiFloat, colorWave, shimmer)
AboutUs.js: Premium dark hero with radial gradient and MNRE Registered Solar Vendor badge with glassmorphism cards
Gallery.js: Premium gold-green gradient stats banner (from-[#F5A623] via-[#FFD166] to-[#00C389]) showing 25+ customers, 100kW+ capacity, MNRE, 5-star
Contact.js: Premium dark hero and 11 glassmorphism contact cards with backdrop-blur styling
Shop.js: Premium dark blue header (bg-gradient from-[#0B3C5D] to-[#071A2E]) with green CTA buttons (#00C389)
index.css: Solar Corporate Premium CSS variables properly defined (--solar-primary, --solar-gold, --solar-cta-green, etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Solar Corporate Premium UI/UX overhaul complete across all 5 pages. Holi effect is date-based and currently active (March 1-16, 2026). Premium theme colors: Primary #0B3C5D, Dark #071A2E, Gold #F5A623→#FFD166, CTA Green #00C389. All navigation links have gold hover underline effect. All green CTA buttons have glow effect on hover.
